flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Georgia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Georgia are 43% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.7k vs $48.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Georgia rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (68.1% → 75.5%).
